title: Commission proposes new measures to fight poverty and improve lives of persons with disabilities
content: The European Commission has presented a bold social package to help end poverty in the EU and to strengthen the rights of persons with disabilities.
snippet: The European Commission has presented a bold social package to help end poverty in the EU and to strengthen the rights of persons with disabilities.

title: Boosting accessibility and inclusion for persons with disabilities
content: The Commission has presented an ambitious social plan to promote the rights of persons with disabilities across the EU.
snippet: The Commission has presented an ambitious social plan to promote the rights of persons with disabilities across the EU.

title: Commission proposes new measures to address poverty and the housing crisis
content: The Commission has proposed new measures to help eradicate poverty and address the housing crisis, including the first-ever EU anti-poverty strategy.
snippet: The Commission has proposed new measures to help eradicate poverty and address the housing crisis, including the first-ever EU anti-poverty strategy.

title: Commissioner Šuica travels to Ankara to discuss EU-Türkiye role in strengthening relations in Mediterranean region
content: Today, Commissioner for the Mediterranean, Dubravka Šuica, is in Ankara to exchange on EU-Türkiye cooperation and issues of shared interests for the wider Mediterranean region. Türkiye is a key partner for the European Union - geographically, strategically, politically, and economically.

title: Fighting housing exclusion and supporting independent living: the first-ever EU Anti-Poverty Strategy presented
content: The European Commission today unveiled the first-ever EU Anti-Poverty Strategy, together with a proposal for a Council Recommendation on fighting housing exclusion and reinforced action under the Strategy for the Rights of Persons with Disabilities.

title: Commissioner Jørgensen hosts high-level implementation dialogue on energy efficiency
content: Key stakeholders, including industry leaders, financial institutions, civil society, and policymakers, came together in Brussels today to discuss practical solutions for successfully implementing the Energy Efficiency Directive (EED).

title: EU and Armenia strengthen security cooperation
content: EU and Armenia held their first ever Summit in Yerevan, reinforcing cooperation in the areas of connectivity, security and defence, economic development and people-to-people contacts. The summit addressed broader regional and global challenges, including the peace agenda.

title: Call for proposals: Innovative projects within affordable housing
content: Under the NEB Facility, you can now apply with your innovative project to help create more beautiful, sustainable and inclusive neighbourhoods across Europe, including solutions that can help address housing challenges.

title: 2026 European Sustainable Energy Awards: vote for your favourite finalist
content: The 9 finalists for the 2026 European Sustainable Energy Awards (EUSEW Awards) have been announced today, highlighting outstanding contributions from individuals and projects to the clean energy transition in Europe.

title: Green Deal Projects Support Office final event: highlighting concrete pathways to accelerate Europe’s green transition
content: At its final event, the Green Deal Projects Support Office showcased results and next steps from EU-funded projects to scale solutions across Europe.
snippet: At its final event, the Green Deal Projects Support Office showcased results and next steps from EU-funded projects to scale solutions across Europe.

title: Commission approves €5 billion German State aid scheme to support decarbonisation of industry
content: The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, a €5 billion German scheme to help companies in industrial sectors decarbonise their production processes.
snippet: The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, a €5 billion German scheme to help companies in industrial sectors decarbonise their production processes.

title: Top scientists to identify future members of European Research Council’s Scientific Council
content: The six members of the Identification Committee will oversee the renewal of the Scientific Council for Horizon Europe 2028–2034.
snippet: The six members of the Identification Committee will oversee the renewal of the Scientific Council for Horizon Europe 2028–2034.

title: EU and Jordan step up delivery of their strategic partnership through €135 million financing agreements
content: Today in Amman, Commissioner for the Mediterranean, Dubravka Šuica, has signed financing agreements worth €135 million with Jordan, alongside the country's Minister of Planning and International Cooperation, Zeina Toukan.
snippet: Today in Amman, Commissioner for the Mediterranean, Dubravka Šuica, has signed financing agreements worth €135 million with Jordan, alongside the country's Minister of Planning and International Coope

title: PESPod #27: Predicting the skills of the future
content: The latest episode of PESPod, the podcast of the European Network of Public Employment Services (PES Network), explores how PES are helping jobseekers and employers prepare for the skills needed in tomorrow’s labour market.

title: The real reason people stay at their jobs
content: Is it just better wages and perks, or something more? Find out the main reasons why employees stay loyal to companies.
snippet: Is it just better wages and perks, or something more? Find out the main reasons why employees stay loyal to companies.

title: Local roots, European reach: New strategy sets direction for research and technology infrastructures
content: The Knowledge Exchange Platform seminar has explored how a European strategy can boost local infrastructures for research and innovation.
snippet: The Knowledge Exchange Platform seminar has explored how a European strategy can boost local infrastructures for research and innovation.

title: New Erasmus Mundus Master’s in multilingualism and cultural diversity
content: Apply for the Erasmus Mundus Master’s in multilingualism and cultural diversity. Study in 3 countries and access funded scholarships for 2026–2028.
snippet: Apply for the Erasmus Mundus Master’s in multilingualism and cultural diversity. Study in 3 countries and access funded scholarships for 2026–2028.

title: Protecting public spaces from terrorist threats in Senegal
content: The EU project Public Spaces+ worked with Senegalese partners to design a total of nine specialised training programmes in the country, which aim to strengthen training and operational capacities in key areas fundamental to the protection of public spaces against terrorist attacks.

title: Commission and European Central Bank host annual conference on European financial integration
content: The conference marks the launch of the Commission's annual European Financial Stability and Integration Review (EFSIR).
snippet: The conference marks the launch of the Commission's annual European Financial Stability and Integration Review (EFSIR).

title: Commission seeks feedback on revised sustainability reporting standards
content: Stakeholders are invited to provide feedback within one month via the Have Your Say portal.
snippet: Stakeholders are invited to provide feedback within one month via the Have Your Say portal.

title: Commissioner Tzitzikostas meets aviation stakeholders to discuss modernising Europe's air traffic management
content: Commissioner for Sustainable Transport and Tourism Apostolos Tzitzikostas will host a high-level dialogue on the future of Europe’s air traffic management (ATM) under the Single European Sky (SES2+) framework.

title: EU and Mediterranean neighbours commit to new declaration to rebuild fish stocks
content: EU and Mediterranean countries today committed to continue their cooperation to rebuild Mediterranean fish stocks, agreeing to adopt a new MedFish4Ever Declaration in 2027.
snippet: EU and Mediterranean countries today committed to continue their cooperation to rebuild Mediterranean fish stocks, agreeing to adopt a new MedFish4Ever Declaration in 2027.

title: Eurostat: EU household electricity prices stable in 2025
content: In the second half of 2025, average electricity prices for households in the EU remained largely stable, with a slight increase to €28.96 from €28.79 per 100 kWh in the first half of the year. These price levels remain well above levels from before the 2022 energy crisis.

title: Member States move ahead with Commission proposal to reinforce data sharing in fight against cross-border tax fraud
content: The Council of the EU has agreed a position on a proposed amendment strengthening cooperation and VAT data sharing between national tax authorities, the European Public Prosecutor's Office (EPPO), the European Anti-Fraud Office (OLAF), and the Eurofisc network of anti-fraud experts.

title: EU-Moldova High-Level Energy Dialogue: Renewed commitment to closer energy cooperation
content: The European Commission and the Republic of Moldova held today the 7th High-Level Energy Dialogue in Brussels, reaffirming their strong partnership on energy security and Moldova’s gradual integration into the European energy market.
snippet: The European Commission and the Republic of Moldova held today the 7th High-Level Energy Dialogue in Brussels, reaffirming their strong partnership on energy security and Moldova’s gradual integration

title: Commission acts against unfairly traded imports of adipic acid
content: Today the Commission imposed anti-dumping duties on imports into the EU of adipic acid from the People’s Republic of China.
snippet: Today the Commission imposed anti-dumping duties on imports into the EU of adipic acid from the People’s Republic of China.

title: Commission welcomes Serbia joining SEPA schemes, allowing for faster and cheaper euro transactions for citizens and businesses
content: Today, 18 banks in Serbia have officially joined the Single Euro Payments Area (SEPA) schemes.
snippet: Today, 18 banks in Serbia have officially joined the Single Euro Payments Area (SEPA) schemes.

title: EU and Armenia sign connectivity partnership, strengthen economic ties and deepen security cooperation

title: Eurostat: EU household gas prices up in the second half of 2025
content: In the second half of 2025, household gas prices in the EU continued to show the seasonal fluctuation between semesters that was visible before the 2022 crisis, with this pattern distorted during 2022 and 2023.
snippet: In the second half of 2025, household gas prices in the EU continued to show the seasonal fluctuation between semesters that was visible before the 2022 crisis, with this pattern distorted during 2022
